title: Aterian Inc. (NASDAQ:ATER) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Aterian reported significant improvements across core metrics in Q1 2024. Gross Margin improved to 65% from 54.8% year-over-year, the highest achieved as a public company. Contribution Margin rose to 14.1% from 5.9% in the prior year. Net Loss improved 80% to $5.2 million from $25.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA Loss improved 38.4% to $2.6 million from $4.3 million. Management emphasized their focus, simplify and stabilize strategy, which includes SKU rationalization focusing on profitable products, reduction in seller accounts and simplified logistics, fixed cost restructuring completed in February 2024, and a cash position of $17.5 million with improved credit facility standing. The company expected product launches in Q2 across Home Labs, Essential Oils, and Mueller Living brands. Expansion into Mercado Libre, Amazon Canada, and Wayfair was planned. Management noted an increase in higher quality M&A opportunities and commitment to accretive transactions. The company projects Q2 2024 revenue of $20-23 million and reaffirms its goal of achieving adjusted EBITDA profitability in H2 2024, supported by strong balance sheet positioning.
